ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, instructor, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "profile_image" TEXT /* Profile image of the user */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief description of the user */,
  "language_level" TEXT /* User's proficiency level in Japanese */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Language in which the user prefers to receive instructions and feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "words" (
  "word_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each word */,
  "word" TEXT /* The Japanese word or phrase */,
  "meaning" TEXT /* Meaning of the word in English */,
  "part_of_speech" TEXT /* Part of speech (e.g., noun, verb) */,
  "example_sentence" TEXT /* Example sentence in Japanese and English */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the word was created */,
  "pronunciation" TEXT /* Audio file for the correct pronunciation */,
  "kanji" TEXT /* Kanji representation of the word */,
  "hiragana" TEXT /* Hiragana representation of the word */,
  "romaji" TEXT /* Romaji (romanized) representation of the word */,
  "word_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the word */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the word */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("word_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_types" (
  "question_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question type */,
  "question_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the question type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the question type */,
  "instructions" TEXT /* Detailed instructions for the question type */,
  "example" TEXT /* An example question of this type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "related_word_id" INTEGER /* ID of the word or phrase related to the question */,
  "question_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question type */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "options" TEXT /* Array of options for multiple-choice questions */,
  "correct_answer" INTEGER /* Index of the correct answer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the question was created */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the question */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_related_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_question_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_type_id") REFERENCES question_types ("question_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quizzes" (
  "quiz_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quiz */,
  "quiz_name" TEXT /* Name of the quiz */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who created the quiz */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the quiz was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the quiz */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Time limit for the quiz in minutes */,
  "passing_score" INTEGER /* Minimum score required to pass the quiz */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Whether the quiz is visible to all users or only specific groups */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quiz_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quizzes_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quiz_questions" (
  "quiz_question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quiz-question relationship */,
  "quiz_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quiz */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the question in the quiz */,
  "explanation" TEXT /* Explanation of the correct answer */,
  "hints" TEXT /* Hints to help users answer the question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quiz_question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quiz_questions_quiz_id FOREIGN KEY ("quiz_id") REFERENCES quizzes ("quiz_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quiz_questions_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_quizzes" (
  "user_quiz_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-quiz relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "quiz_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quiz */,
  "started_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user started the quiz */,
  "completed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user completed the quiz */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the user */,
  "is_retake" INTEGER /* Whether the user can retake the quiz */,
  "retake_limit" INTEGER /* Number of times the user can retake the quiz */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_quiz_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_quizzes_quiz_id FOREIGN KEY ("quiz_id") REFERENCES quizzes ("quiz_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_quizzes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_answers" (
  "user_answer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user answer */,
  "user_quiz_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user-quiz relationship */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question */,
  "selected_answer" INTEGER /* Index of the selected answer */,
  "is_correct" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the answer is correct */,
  "answered_at" TEXT /* Date and time the answer was submitted */,
  "explanation_viewed" INTEGER /* Whether the user has viewed the explanation after answering */,
  "feedback_given" INTEGER /* Whether the user has provided feedback on the question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_answer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_answers_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_answers_user_quiz_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_quiz_id") REFERENCES user_quizzes ("user_quiz_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user progress entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* ID of the word or phrase */,
  "correct_answers" INTEGER /* Number of correct answers for the word or phrase */,
  "total_attempts" INTEGER /* Total number of attempts for the word or phrase */,
  "last_attempted_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last attempt */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* User's confidence level in the word or phrase */,
  "last_practice_date" TEXT /* Date of the last practice session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_progress_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_progress_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target (e.g., word, quiz, question) */,
  "target_type" TEXT /* Type of the target (e.g., word, quiz, question) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (0-5) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the feedback was created */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Whether the feedback is anonymous */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Whether the feedback has been approved by an administrator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
